title: Lore Inaccurate Goofy Meme Assets
description: A small resource pack that adds some goofy sounds to Cobblemon!
body:
A small resourcepack that adds some goofy sounds to cobblemon! If you like laugh tracks, then you'll like this pack!

The main feature of this pack can be heard when catching Pokémon. If a Pokémon escapes when you try to catch it, you may hear the studio laughing at you and your misfortune! Or you might hear a sad song instead. 

Introduces new PC start up noises fresh from 1992! Dial up has never been faster!

That's all it does for now. More sounds will be introduced in the future as I figure out the system for Pokémon cries.
